prompt: our monorepo CI takes 45 minutes on every PR even for a 1-line readme change. we use github actions, turborepo, pnpm. 30 packages. what can we do?
assertions: Identifies affected-only builds as the primary fix
Provides turbo --filter command or GitHub Actions conditional logic
Mentions remote caching with setup instructions
Includes shallow clone (fetch-depth) recommendation for CI
Provides at least one concrete YAML or config snippet
